name.label: Name
name.description: An optional label shown on the node in the editor.

config.label: Configuration
config.description: Selects the Claude agent configuration (sign-in and run settings) this node uses.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.description: Sets what to ask the assistant; defaults to the incoming message payload.

responseMode.label: Response style
responseMode.description: Chooses whether to send only the final answer or stream each part as it arrives.

interactive.label: Interactive
interactive.description: Lets the assistant pause to ask for approval or a clarifying question through the ask port.

includePartial.label: Live typing
includePartial.description: Streams generated text word by word for a live typing effect.

permissionMode.label: Tool permissions
permissionMode.description: Overrides the configuration's tool permissions just for this node.

errorPort.label: Error port
errorPort.description: Adds a separate error output; when the node throws, the error is sent there instead of halting the flow.

completePort.label: Complete port
completePort.description: Adds a complete output port that emits after the node finishes handling a message.

statusPort.label: Status port
statusPort.description: Adds a status output port that emits the node's status changes as messages.

input.label: Prompt
input.description: The prompt to run (from msg.payload). Can also carry a control message that answers a pending Ask or interrupts the run.

response.label: Response
response.description: The agent's reply — streamed chunks and/or the final result.

ask.label: Ask
ask.description: An interactive request Claude is waiting on — a permission approval or a question.
